releases.notes: v1.0.4 — Polish: Main screen mode label now uses your brand accent colour; device name shown at the bottom. First release intended for OTA install via RELEASES tab end-to-end.
v1.0.3 — DNS hijack TTL 60s → 1s. Was caching bogus reply on iOS, blocking github.io fetch for ~1 min after hijack window closed. Also added 'Safari: 192.168.4.1' hint on APP screen.
v1.0.2 — fix OTA download (Safari ReadableStream → XHR arraybuffer).
v1.0.1 — DNS hijack auto-stops after 30s (was preventing OTA from fetching github.io). USB flash this once, then future updates via OTA.
v1.0.0 — Stable baseline. P1 pairing + captive portal · P2 tune · P3 calibrate · P4 telemetry · P5 brand · P6 screensaver. Digit-only WiFi pwd. iOS: open in Safari for OTA (not Captive Wi-Fi popup).
